events.title: YSC Happy Hour - Transamerica Building
events.description: Thursday, February 19, 5:30 PM at Transamerica Building 48th Floor. Registration required via Partiful link. Must check in during arrival slots: 5:30 PM, 6:00 PM, or 6:30 PM. Exclusive access to 48th-floor bar with SF views.
